title: Sealapack Ready to USE Aluminium FOIL, 29cm x 15 METRE ROLL,Silver,SAP006
features: ROAST, WRAP, STORE, SEAL: Sealapack Aluminium Foil provides 15 metres on a ready to use roll. Perfect all-rounder use when roasting, wrap foods to transport hygienically, wrap foods for storage, seal open containers
DURABLE: Long lasting foil that is on a long 15 metre roll. Perfect for use in a busy home kitchen and party catering. Wide enough to line most oven trays and dinner plates and bowls.
VERSATILE: Wrap packed lunches, cold cooked foods for the freezer, wrap corn cobs to cook on a BBQ , cover tray bakes and meat during roasting

GET AHEAD: Wrap individual portion meals ahead of time, then add to oven or BBQ to cook for a quick easy, fuss free meal. Add chicken or fish with vegetables , herbs and spices to make individual foil ready to cook parcels
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: ROLL 29CM x 15 METRE ROLL
description: Product Description Sealapack Aluminium Foil provides 15 metres on a ready to use roll. Perfect all-rounder use when roasting, wrap foods to transport hygienically, wrap foods for storage, seal open containers. Long lasting foil that is on a long 15 metre roll. Perfect for use in a busy home kitchen and party catering. Wide enough to line most oven trays and dinner plates and bowls. Wrap packed lunches, cold cooked foods for the freezer, wrap corn cobs to cook on a BBQ , cover tray bakes and meat during roasting. Wrap individual portion meals ahead of time, then add to oven or BBQ to cook for a quick easy, fuss free meal. Add chicken or fish with vegetables , herbs and spices to make individual foil ready to cook parcels.
